criteria.description: When TEMPLATE is omitted, doctrine org init scaffolds the existing minimal org pack under PACK_PATH (same three files and overwrite/--force semantics).
criteria.evidence: tests/cli/test_doctrine_org_commands.py::test_doctrine_org_init_scaffolds_minimal_pack, test_doctrine_org_init_refuses_to_overwrite_existing — minimal three-file scaffold and refuse-overwrite retained without --template.
criteria.notes: NFR-002 compatibility covered by the same CLI suite.

criteria.description: When TEMPLATE is provided, doctrine org init accepts TEMPLATE, ORG_NAME, and optional LOCAL_PATH and performs a template render into PACK_PATH.
TEMPLATE may be a local directory or git HTTPS/SSH URL; branch may be encoded and/or passed via --branch; revision is resolved before render.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/doctrine/test_template_render_resolve.py — local path, HTTPS #ref/@ref, SSH fragment, scp git@ userinfo preservation, --branch merge/conflict, GitSource factory resolve, fetch failure.

criteria.description: ORG_NAME validated fail-closed against doctrine-template contract (kebab-case, length, reserved doctrine-org, placeholders/TODO); clear rule_id error; no sanitising.
LOCAL_PATH is distinct from PACK_PATH; omitted LOCAL_PATH defaults to pack; substituted for {{LOCAL_PATH}}.
criteria.evidence: DEFAULT_LOCAL_PATH=pack in template_render package; pipeline/CLI happy paths write to PACK_PATH while substituting LOCAL_PATH; substitute tests cover {{LOCAL_PATH}} replacement.

criteria.description: LOCAL_PATH validated as non-empty path string; reject placeholders/TODO; clear error; no sanitising.
Render honours .templateignore; matching paths excluded from PACK_PATH; built-in exclude of .git/ and .templateignore itself.
criteria.notes: removeprefix('./') used so .git is not corrupted to git.

criteria.description: Substitute every literal {{ORG_NAME}} and {{LOCAL_PATH}} across copied file contents.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/doctrine/test_template_render_substitute.py::test_substitute_replaces_both_tokens; CLI/pipeline happy paths assert substituted content under PACK_PATH.

criteria.description: Fail if unfilled {{ORG_NAME}} or {{LOCAL_PATH}} tokens would remain; do not present a successful render.
On resolve or validation failure, do not leave a partially rendered destination presented as success.
criteria.evidence: test_pipeline_rejects_invalid_org_before_write (no write); test_resolve_local_missing / test_resolve_git_fetch_failure; CLI invalid org-name leaves destination absent.
criteria.notes: NFR-001 actionable errors covered by rule_id messages in validation/resolve failures.
